title: Cut and verify v0.1.0 CLI dogfood release
description: Create the v0.1.0 release tag or release candidate once CI, release automation, changelog, clean install, and dogfood canaries are complete. Verify release metadata and artifacts from the produced release.
acceptance_criteria: v0.1.0 tag or documented release candidate exists; refute version reports the release version, commit, and build date; release artifacts or go install path are verified; known issues are recorded before closing Phase 1.

title: Dogfood Go and Rust refactors in shatter temp copies
description: Run Phase 1 canaries in disposable temp copies of shatter/shatter-go and any claimed Rust area: doctor --json, dry-run --json, apply, and normal focused verification.
acceptance_criteria: shatter temp-copy canary results are recorded with commands and outcomes; Go canary is attempted first; Rust canary is attempted only where support remains claimed and tool prerequisites exist; failures are classified.

title: Dogfood Go refactors in kapow temp copies
description: Run Phase 1 canaries in disposable temp copies of kapow/api and selected kapow/tools modules: doctor --json, dry-run --json, apply, and normal focused verification.
acceptance_criteria: kapow/api and at least one selected kapow/tools temp-copy canary are recorded with commands and outcomes; failures are classified; no normal kapow working tree is modified.

title: Dogfood Go refactors in zolem temp copy
description: Run a realistic refute doctor, dry-run JSON rename, apply rename, and project verification in a disposable temp copy of zolem. Do not touch the normal working tree.
acceptance_criteria: zolem temp-copy canary result is recorded with commands, selected symbol, refute JSON output classification, apply result, and project verification result; failures are classified as schema, UX, dependency, backend correctness, or project-specific.

title: Verify clean go install from canonical module path
description: Verify refute can be installed from a clean temp module using github.com/shatterproof-ai/refute/cmd/refute at the intended release ref. This was previously blocked in-agent by SSH auth; capture the exact command and result.
acceptance_criteria: A clean temp module install is verified or a precise external-auth blocker is documented; refute version runs from the installed binary; README install instructions match the verified path.

title: Write CHANGELOG and release notes for v0.1.0
description: Add CHANGELOG.md with a v0.1.0 entry that summarizes the CLI-only release, supported and experimental backends, known limitations, and any install or canary caveats.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md exists; v0.1.0 entry matches README/support matrix claims; known limitations and unsupported adapters are explicit; release notes are ready to paste into a tag or GitHub release.

title: Add repeatable v0.1.0 release automation
description: Add a release workflow or documented manual release path for linux and macOS amd64/arm64 artifacts. Prefer GoReleaser if it keeps the setup simple; otherwise document exact release commands.
acceptance_criteria: A maintainer can produce v0.1.0 artifacts repeatably; checksums are generated or documented; release metadata is set via ldflags; release process avoids unsupported adapter claims.

title: Add CI for unit and integration test gates
description: Add GitHub Actions or equivalent CI for go test ./... and go test -tags integration ./internal/. Optional-tool integration tests must skip cleanly when their tools are unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs unit tests and integration tests; missing optional TypeScript, Java, or other non-required tools produce skips rather than failures; README or support docs do not contradict the CI coverage.

title: Finish Phase 1 CLI dogfood release
description: Complete the remaining Phase 1 work after the Milestone 3 safety pass: CI, release automation, changelog, install verification, dogfood canaries, and v0.1.0 release readiness.
acceptance_criteria: All child issues are closed and the project can cut or has cut a v0.1.0 CLI dogfood release from local main.
